case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. RONALD MORRIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-12-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200002615), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED NOV-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-12-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, RONALD

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-10-2021 CONTINUED TO NOV-09-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRIS, RONALD $8,808.08 PRINCIPAL, $315.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,123.98, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, RONALD DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-30-2020
